findings.fix_prompt: Check that all API endpoints, images, and external resources load correctly. There are 3 failing requests to fix.

summary: Basic technical audit completed (AI analysis was unavailable). Found 1 issue(s) from automated checks.
bundled_fix_prompt:
I ran a reliability audit on https://advantageonlineshopping.com and found the following issues.
Please fix all of them:

1. [HIGH] 3 failed network request(s)
   Fix: Check that all API endpoints, images, and external resources load correctly. There are 3 failing requests to fix.

After fixing all issues, make sure the site works correctly on both desktop (1280px) and mobile (390px) viewports.
